annotator_notes: Fragile or delicate items must be placed on the bookshelf for protection. Battery-powered devices should go in the side drawer to prevent accidental activation. Wired devices and non-fragile items can stay on the coffee table. Large or bulky objects should use the storage box for stability. Items not fitting these rules should be sorted by primary function and material type.
